I want to keep my main page reserved for articles that are more completed and actively used. Everything listed here is unfinished ideas and thoughts that I may and probably will, delete at some point. For now I am idea hoarding. 

== Chinese == 
[[chinese-resources]]
[[chinese-saved]]
[[unfamiliar-chinese]]

== Lists ==


== Misc == 
[[ahk to audio]]
[[free space on gitlab]]
[[quiet]]
[[random-memories]]
[[idea_trans_subs|Transcribe with context]]
